caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing. He is wearing a shirt that features the text "ION NEVER DO SHIT" in a stylized white font. To his left, there are numerous framed photographs on a white wall, and behind him, a white mannequin stands next to a clothing rack. A small logo reading "BOSSY FELIX TOT" appears in the bottom right, while another circular logo is visible in the bottom left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his facial expressions as he looks toward someone off-camera. The background and equipment remain static as he continues his conversation, with his mouth moving and his gaze shifting slightly across the frames.
